case_title: RICHARD ROISMAN VS. UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CT CORP) SERVED OCT-08-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROISMAN, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ROISMAN, RICHARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,596.00 FILED BY ROISMAN, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
